name: GOLFTEC Carle Place
about: GOLFTEC Carle Place is a golf training and club fitting center focused on data-driven instruction. It utilizes advanced technology, including OPTIMOTION motion capture, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors, to provide detailed swing feedback and club optimization. The center offers personalized golf lessons, practice memberships, and club fitting services, with an emphasis on structured improvement plans and re-evaluations. GOLFTEC operates with a network of PGA-award winning coaches who create personalized game plans for students of all skill levels, and it provides pro shop discounts for gear purchases.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven coaching using advanced motion tracking and launch monitor technology
Personalized improvement plans and re-evaluations from expert PGA coaches
Club fitting services that promise an average of 21 more yards off the tee

simulator_hardware.notes: Launch monitors are used for club fitting and practice sessions

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you should bring your own clubs. GOLFTEC also offers club rentals and a pro shop where you can purchase gear.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: There is no mention of food or drink service, so it is likely that outside food and drinks are not permitted.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC's indoor lessons and practice sessions are not structured like a traditional 18-hole round. The duration depends on the lesson or package purchased.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC provides coaching services for juniors and youth, making it a suitable venue for young golfers.
